title: Review
description: A written review or opinion submitted by a passenger about a completed mobility service, driver, or vehicle.

reviewText.description: The written text of the review

reviewedAt.description: Date and time the review was submitted

reviewer.description: The passenger who submitted this review

target.description: The entity being rated, with id and category (Order, Fulfillment, Provider, Agent)

range.description: Rating scale definition (numeric range or descriptor array)

ratingValue.description: Numeric rating value selected by the user

feedback.description: Textual feedback or written review accompanying the rating
